query:
Here's my feedback.  There are enough changes here, the design and design review process just need to rerun.  EVERY DESIGN ARTIFACT MUST BE ALIGNED.  MANDATORY.  That said, here is my feedback on the design: ---                                                                       
  Item 1: pending_cycle_reviews source — accept the substitution, fix the   
  architecture                                                              
                                                                  
  The semantics shift ("formal start event" vs "Unimatrix was queried during
   this cycle") is acceptable. Post-col-022, a properly-run cycle always has
   both. The cycle_events.cycle_start approach is actually cleaner because
  it's already timestamped for K-window filtering and it naturally excludes 
  pre-cycle_events era cycles without an extra condition.         

  The problem is that the architecture didn't fully update. Two places still
   say query_log.feature_cycle:
  - ADR-004 table entry (line 105): query_log.feature_cycle + 90-day default
  - Integration Points "Upstream dependencies" table (line 189): query_log |
   feature_cycle column for K-window pending set                            
                                                                            
  The spec's SQL (cycle_events) is correct; the architecture's two stale
  references need updating before delivery. Close spec OQ-02 with "accepted:
   cycle_events.cycle_start. Architecture ADR-004 and Integration Points
  updated to match." The query_log.feature_cycle column does not exist and  
  should not be introduced here.                                  

  ---
  Item 2: Schema cascade count — spec needs updating, architecture is 
  authoritative                                                             
               
  Spec AC-02b has 5 items; architecture has 7. The two missing from the     
  spec:                                                                     
   
  - Item 5 (server.rs assertion: assert_eq!(version, N) → 18) — not in spec 
  - Item 6 (rename test_current_schema_version_is_17 → >= 17) — not in spec
                                                                            
  Architecture is authoritative. Update spec AC-02b to 7 items before       
  delivery proceeds. The grep gate at the end (grep -r 'schema_version.*==  
  17') catches the hard reference but not the test rename — that one        
  requires explicit checklist coverage.                           

  ---
  Item 3: raw_signals_available type — spec is correct, fix the architecture
                                                                            
  bool is right. SQLite INTEGER 1/0 maps to Rust bool cleanly via sqlx. The
  architecture Integration Surface at line 209 shows raw_signals_available: 
  i32 — that's wrong. i32 forces manual 0/1 comparisons in handler code,
  which is exactly what you don't want. Fix the architecture struct         
  signature to raw_signals_available: bool. The DDL stays INTEGER NOT NULL 
  DEFAULT 1 — sqlx handles the mapping.

  ---
  Item 4 (unrequested): SR-07 discriminator inconsistency between 
  architecture and spec                                                     
                       
  Architecture (lines 158-178) introduces a SELECT COUNT(*) FROM            
  cycle_events WHERE cycle_id = ? discriminator query in the                
  force=true/empty-observations path. The spec doesn't have this — it uses
  get_cycle_review() return value as the sole discriminator and sends       
  ERROR_NO_OBSERVATION_DATA when both observations and stored record are
  absent.

  The architecture's discriminator handles the edge case "signals purged    
  before review was ever written" by routing to observation_metrics
  fallback. The spec accepts ERROR_NO_OBSERVATION_DATA for that case        
  (OQ-01).                                                        

  The spec's approach is correct for V1 — the pathological case doesn't     
  warrant the extra query. Close OQ-01: "accepted —
  ERROR_NO_OBSERVATION_DATA for no-stored-record case. No cycle_events COUNT
   discriminator." Remove the discriminator from the architecture's control
  flow section so delivery doesn't implement it.

  ---
  Summary: three architecture fixes, two spec fixes, one OQ closure before 
  delivery:                                                                 
   
  ┌─────┬───────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────────┐   
  │     │         File          │                  Fix                  │
  ├─────┼───────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────┤   
  │ A   │ architecture.md       │ query_log.feature_cycle →             │
  │     │ ADR-004 table         │ cycle_events.cycle_start              │   
  ├─────┼───────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────┤   
  │ B   │ architecture.md       │ Remove query_log row for pending set  │
  │     │ Integration Points    │                                       │   
  ├─────┼───────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ C   │ architecture.md       │ raw_signals_available: i32 → bool     │
  │     │ Integration Surface   │                                       │   
  ├─────┼───────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ D   │ architecture.md       │ Remove cycle_events COUNT             │   
  │     │ control flow SR-07    │ discriminator                         │   
  ├─────┼───────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ E   │ spec AC-02b           │ Expand 5 → 7 items (add server.rs +   │   
  │     │                       │ test rename)                          │   
  ├─────┼───────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ F   │ spec OQ-01            │ Close: spec approach accepted         │   
  ├─────┼───────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────┤   
  │ G   │ spec OQ-02            │ Close: cycle_events.cycle_start       │
  │     │                       │ accepted; architecture updated        │   
  └─────┴───────────────────────┴───────────────────────────────────────┘

entries.title: ADR-004 crt-033: pending_cycle_reviews K-window scoping via cycle_events.cycle_start with 90-day default
K-window set-difference query for pending/backlog status reporting

ADR-005 col-024: Open-Ended Window Capped at unix_now_secs(), No Additional Max-Age Limit
